examples: That's what we tried to portray in the book, this feeling of opulence and grandeur.
The opulence of the rubber barons could only be exceeded by their brutality.
Foreigners with dollars, pounds, Swiss francs, or Czech crowns lived in opulence.
There is little fear of opulence, as long as it is elegant and not cheesy.
You can see the industry's opulence at the trade fair it mounts each spring in Basel.
